Registration & Participation

Status: Registration opens February 25th, 2026.

Conference Fees

Professional Ticket £350
Professional Ticket (Early Bird) £300
Individual Ticket £250
Individual Ticket (Early Bird) £200
Student Ticket £150

Early Bird discount expires end of April.


Celebratory Dinner

Friday 18th September, 7:00pm – 11:00pm
£55 (includes a glass of wine and a buffet)

We welcome applications for discounts for special circumstances

please contact mph_2026_registrations@metaphorum.org
